result.summary: Found 3 issues on this BetRivers Pennsylvania promotional page, including a major layout overlap and accessibility concerns.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky banner overlaps and partially obscures the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making important terms and conditions unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or margin to the fine print section so it clears the sticky 'SCROLL DOWN' bar, or reposition the scroll indicator so it does not cover any text content.

issues.description: The fine print/disclaimer text is extremely small (appears to be around 8–9px) and rendered in low contrast against the white/light background, making it nearly illegible for most users.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size to at least 12px and ensure sufficient color contrast ratio (minimum 4.5:1) to meet WCAG AA accessibility standards.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons (Casino, Live Casino, Sports, Poker, Promos, Support) are unevenly spaced — 'Sports' label appears without an icon, creating visual inconsistency with the other nav items.
issues.suggestion: Ensure each navigation item has a consistent icon above the label to maintain visual uniformity across the bottom navigation bar.
